docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF WALTERS, WAYNE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-23-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-23-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTFF WAYNE WLATERS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WALGREEN CO. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY KEVIN ZHACH, ASSISTANT STORE MANAGER-TRAINEE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WALTERS, WAYNE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALGREEN CO. $500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-17-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WALGREEN CO.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT WALGREEN CO.
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WALTERS, WAYNE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-23-2017 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY WALTERS, WAYNE AS TO DEFENDANT WALGREEN CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-23-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
